titleStmt.title: SII 36.196: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 196. (A.R. No. 196 of 1910.) KAḌAGATTŪR, DHARMAPURI TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT. On the west wall of the Chōḻīśvara temple.

summary.p: (Śaka 1362, Dunmati, Vaikāsi, śu., 5, Sunday, Uttirāḍa (irregular) = A.D. 1440.)

Gift of certain taxes to the temple of Muḍigoṇḍa-Chōḻichuramuḍaiya Nāyaṉār at Kaṭaikaṭṭūr alias Dēsi Uyyakkoṇḍachōḻa-paṭṭaṇa, in Tagaḍa-nāḍu alias Gaṅga-nāḍu, a subdivision of Nigarilichōḻa-maṇḍalam by the Telugu chief Mala Rāhuttar of Muḷvāych-chāvaḍi, while the Pradhāni Mādaṇa-Daṇṇāyakkar of Muḷvāy was governing the country. The taxes gifted by the donor are nāḍu-daḷavārikkai, cheṭṭiyār-magamai, and aḷḷāya-māṉiyam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī man mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran harirāya vipāṭaṉ
rājādhirāja rājaparameśvaran vīrapratāpa devarāya
mahārāyar Ivar pradhāni muḷuvāy mātaṇa taṇṇāyakka Uṭai
yaṟku cellāniṉṟa cakābdam 1000 3 100 6 10 2 Itin cellā niṉṟa
tuṉmati varuṣattu vaikāci māsattu pūrvapakṣattu
pañcamiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nā
ḷ nikarilicoḻa maṇṭalattuk kaṅka nāṭṭut takaṭa nāṭṭuk ka
ṭaikkaṭṭūrāṉa teciuyyakkoṇṭa coḻa paṭṭaṇattu
nayiṉār muṭikoṇṭa coḷīcuramuṭaiya nāyiṉāṟkut te
vatāṉamāṉa vākūril Upaiyamāṟka muḷvāyc cāvaṭiyili
rukkum teluṅka rākkuttaril gajasimhagajagaṇḍapeṇḍāravaṉ ka
ḍekoṇṭa viṭamiṭṭa rāhuttar makaṉ malarāhuttar tharmmam
Upaiyamāṟka nāṭutaḷavārikkai ceṭṭiyār makamai Uṭpaṭa
vum cantaiyaḷil Oru kaṭai Aṭikkācu Aḷḷāya māṉiyamākac can
tirātittavarai naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum Inta tharmmattukku Ahita
ñ ceytavaṉ geṅgaikkaraiyiṟ kurāṟ pacuk koṉṟāṉ pāpaṅ koḷḷuvaṉ §
Digital edition of SII 36.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
